description: Binary scoring checklist + sample inputs to regression-test the optimistic-code-review skill. 6 yes/no checks; pass target >= 5.5/6.

checklist.name: language
checklist.check: The ENTIRE response (incl. fix menu and final Codex offer) is in the same language as the user's input.

checklist.name: issue-location
checklist.check: Every issue cites a precise file:line location.

checklist.name: why-how
checklist.check: Every Critical/High/Medium issue has both WHY (impact) and HOW (concrete fix).

checklist.name: optimistic-identity
checklist.check: The Positives section is present and non-empty (>= 1 genuine strength).

checklist.name: graded-verdict
checklist.check: The A-F grade is consistent with the counts table, evaluated top-down with no ambiguity.

checklist.name: robustness
checklist.check: Preconditions are verified (git repo present; Codex offered only if codex:review is available) rather than assumed.

samples.expect_scope: Scope 2 — must ask base branch explicitly; respond in Italian
